description: A triple gear stack on a single central hub with an internal keyway, aligned along the Z-axis.
components: Internal keyway (3mm wide, 2mm deep, +X side, through-all)
Gear 1 (24-tooth star-polygon, tip diameter 54mm, root diameter 44mm, Z=2 to Z=10)
Gear 2 (18-tooth star-polygon, tip diameter 42mm, root diameter 34mm, Z=18 to Z=26)
Gear 3 (12-tooth star-polygon, tip diameter 30mm, root diameter 24mm, Z=34 to Z=42)
notes: To model the star-polygon gears, construct a 2D wire of 2N vertices alternating between the tip radius and root radius. Extrude each gear individually, union them with the main hub, and finally perform a single subtraction for the central bore and the keyway to ensure clean internal cuts. The keyway slot spans from X=3 to X=5, and Y=-1.5 to Y=1.5.
